title: urtica gracilis subsp. sondenii
intro: Urtica gracilis subsp. sondenii, a lesser-known subspecies of the Urtica gracilis plant, is a type of nettle native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Maori medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Urtica gracilis subsp. sondenii include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, Urtica gracilis subsp. sondenii is often used in infusions, tinctures, and poultices to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
